title: Format 4:5 Vertical Premium Puma Street
prompt:
.
FORMAT:
4:5 vertical premium PUMA street-performance campaign
hyper-realistic sports-fashion advertising
luxury urban Gen-Z editorial
Instagram billboard composition
8K ultra-detail cinematic realism

CONCEPT:
PUMA redefines modern athletic luxury
speed-driven streetwear identity
bold masculine confidence
urban motion fused with premium fashion energy

SCENE:
Young Indian male model walking through futuristic metro street in downtown Mumbai during golden sunset
wet reflective pavement after light rain
massive LED billboards glowing softly
orange-pink sky gradients
luxury sports car parked nearby
wearing oversized black-and-red PUMA techwear coord-set
premium chunky sneakers
silver chain accessories
wind movement in clothing
confident sharp facial expression
high-energy street luxury aura

COMPOSITION:
cinematic low-angle framing
architectural depth perspective
dynamic movement composition
model positioned center-left
large negative space for typography
editorial billboard balance
urban leading lines guiding toward subject

PRODUCT FOCUS:
PUMA techwear coord-set hero styling
high-detail nylon and mesh fabric texture
premium athletic tailoring
visible stitching realism
luxury sneaker detailing
fashion-first commercial framing
realistic garment folds and shadows

UI ELEMENTS:
minimal futuristic PUMA interface system
floating speed-performance card
“ENGINEERED MOTION”
drop-release timer graphics
technical garment labeling
micro product-detail markers
matte black and neon-red overlays
performance stat typography
wishlist micro icon

TYPOGRAPHY:
Huge bold headline:
“RUN THE CITY.”

subheading:
“Built for movement, made for presence.”

CTA:
“DISCOVER PUMA SS26”

GRAPHICS:
motion-blur streak overlays
urban grid graphics
futuristic performance textures
minimal speed indicators
premium whitespace composition
cinematic sports framing

LIGHTING:
golden-hour cinematic sunlight
wet pavement reflections
high dynamic range realism
luxury skin-tone rendering
commercial sports-fashion exposure
soft neon ambient glow

CAMERA:
Sony FX3
35mm cinematic lens
f/1.8
high-end sports editorial photography

STYLE:
PUMA × ACRONYM × Nike Techwear aesthetic
premium Indian street-performance luxury
cinematic urban fashion campaign
